title: 일상 회화 첫걸음
description: 인사, 자기소개, 취미 — 매일 쓰는 표현부터 입을 풀어요.

keyPhrases.en: Hi, I'm Minji. Nice to meet you.

conversation.topic: First-time introductions. Greet the user, ask their name and where they're from. Keep it warm and simple (A1~A2).
conversation.openingLine: Hi there! It's so nice to meet you. I'm Alex. What's your name?

keyPhrases.en: Can I have a coffee, please?

drills.text: Can I have a coffee, please?

conversation.topic: The user is a customer at a cafe. Play a friendly server taking their order. Ask what they'd like and confirm the order.
conversation.openingLine: Hi, welcome in! What can I get for you today?
hints: 주문해보세요 — Can I have ... / I'd like ...
가격을 물어보세요 — How much is it?

keyPhrases.en: In my free time, I like listening to music.
keyPhrases.ko: 여가 시간에는 음악 듣는 걸 좋아해요.
당신은 어때요? — 대화를 이어가는 마법의 한마디

conversation.topic: The user just learned hobby expressions. Ask about their hobbies and free time. Encourage them to use 'really into' and 'I like ~ing'.
conversation.openingLine: Hi! Great drills today. So, what are you into these days?
hints: 요즘 빠져 있는 취미를 말해보세요 — I'm really into ...

keyPhrases.en: Excuse me, where is the station?
How do I get to the museum?

drills.text: How do I get to the museum?

conversation.topic: The user is lost in a city and asking a local for directions. Give simple directions and ask if they need more help.
conversation.openingLine: You look a little lost! Are you trying to find somewhere?
hints: 장소를 물어보세요 — Where is ... / How do I get to ...
거리를 확인하세요 — Is it far from here?
고맙다고 인사하세요 — Thanks for your help!

keyPhrases.en: This weekend, I'm going to visit my family.
keyPhrases.ko: 이번 주말에 가족을 보러 갈 거예요.

keyPhrases.en: Maybe we can hang out together.

drills.text: I'm going to visit my family.
Maybe we can hang out together.

conversation.topic: It's Friday. Chat with the user about their weekend plans and share simple plans of your own.
conversation.openingLine: It's almost the weekend! Do you have any fun plans?
hints: 계획을 말해보세요 — This weekend, I'm going to ...
상대의 계획을 물어보세요 — Do you have any plans?
함께 하자고 제안해보세요 — Maybe we can ...

keyPhrases.en: It's such a nice day today.
It looks like it's going to rain.
I love this kind of weather.

drills.text: It's such a nice day today.
It looks like it's going to rain.
I love this kind of weather.

conversation.topic: Make light small talk about the weather, the way strangers chat while waiting. Comment on the weather and ask what the user prefers.
conversation.openingLine: Wow, can you believe this weather? It's so lovely out today!
hints: 날씨를 말해보세요 — It's such a nice day. / It looks like rain.
좋아하는 날씨를 말해보세요 — I love this kind of weather.
